summarization.a: The polar chart displays the relationship between the location on the wafer and etch rate of Al2O3.

a.question: What is the highest observed difference in etch rate on the wafer?
a.answer: The largest difference in etch rate is 0.008 nm/cycle

a.question: What can be a reason for non-uniformity in processing?
a.answer: An explanation for non-uniformity in ALE processes is the non-uniform distribution of reactants in the reactor.

a.question: Which trend can be identified regarding the dependence of the etch rate on the position in the reactor?
a.answer: There seems to be solely a radial dependence. There is no uni-directional trend visible.

a.question: Where has the etch process the highest performance (i.e. etch rate)?
a.answer: In the center of the reactor, in a circle with a radius of around 1 cm.
